mapper.select:
SELECT t1. NAME menuName, concat(t1.channel, '/', t2.`op`) `path`, concat(t1.permissions, ':', t2.`op`) perms FROM t_sys_menu t1 JOIN t_sys_operate t2 ON t1.id = t2.menu_id JOIN t_sys_role_operate t3 ON t2.id = t3.operate_id
AND role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT t1.id, t2.id AS menuId, t1. NAME, t2. NAME AS menuName, t2.parent_id, t1.`op` FROM t_sys_operate t1 JOIN t_sys_menu t2 ON t1.menu_id = t2.id
SELECT t1.*, t2. NAME AS menuName FROM t_sys_operate t1 JOIN t_sys_menu t2 ON t1.menu_id = t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM t_sys_role_operate t1 JOIN t_sys_operate t2 ON t1.operate_id = t2.id AND t1.role_id = #{roleId} AND t2.menu_id = #{menuId}
